source: OpenFEMA FimaNfipClaims v2 (public redacted claims), Region 5. Reloaded monthly (R/P1M). Real OpenFEMA figures — not endorsed by FEMA.
note: Phase 1 county×year NFIP CLAIMS rollup: count, total paid (building+contents+ICC) with split, by year(yearOfLoss), and SFHA in/out share (ratedFloodZone). Policies-in-force / coverage $ are NOT included (Phase 2 — FimaNfipPolicies is 73.6M rows). 'paid' is total claim payments; flood losses are cumulative since the program's start.
